title: Route consequence and replay phase
summary: After the first route-aware living-world pass, lane 4 should keep turning world state and support choices into felt route differences. This phase expands replay consequence, then sharpens support meaning or simplification across another outing.

execution_order.why_now: One more route should materially feel different because of living-world state.
Replay value should come from ecology and route feel, not just more text.
The new route difference should stay legible and soft, not opaque.
Support choices still need one more pass to prove they matter by feel.
The support row should feel meaningfully different or intentionally lighter.
The support layer should stay useful without sliding into inventory sprawl.

guardrails: No new shell, quest log, or inventory layer.
Prefer soft opportunity and felt route differences.
If a support still does not matter by feel, simplify it instead of adding more support UI.

main_248_focus.copy_goal: turn the existing Held Sand replay cue into a full active outing instead of leaving it board-only flavor

recommended_variant.activeSummary: In Coastal Scrub, read where open pioneer and holding cover start trapping sand before the thicker edge takes over.

guardrails: Keep notebook-ready and filed states canonically Scrub Pattern.
Keep evidence-slot ids and route order unchanged.
Leave Haze Edge and Pioneer Clue as board-only follow-ons for now.

main_249_focus.copy_goal: keep note-tabs notebook-first during the Held Sand replay window instead of collapsing onto the same replay sentence as hand-lens

recommended_wrap.label: SCRUB PATTERN
recommended_wrap.text: Walk the coast-to-forest transect from pioneer scrub into lower fell.

guardrails: Keep hand-lens live and process-specific on Held Sand.
Keep notebook-ready and filed states canonically Scrub Pattern.
Do not widen this pass into Bright Survey, Wrack Shelter, or a generic replay-support framework.
